theme: mountain pass bunker defense hidden ambush military

entities.facing_rule: Revealed rifle and gun squads face their current route target while concealed slots remain abstract markers until reveal.
entities.animation_rule: Guard bodies swap between stand and hold poses, use directional facing marks, and pulse on reveal or attack cadence.
entities.movement_rule: Revealed squads reposition between four fork routes based on left-side route focus markers and fallback orders.

entities.facing_rule: Engineer squads face the bunker line while repairing and turn with movement when retasked.
entities.animation_rule: Engineer teams alternate stand and hold poses and emit green repair pulses when bunker recovery triggers.
entities.movement_rule: Engineers anchor near the bunker line and only shift lanes when their source slot or fallback logic changes.

entities.facing_rule: Gun nests, sniper ridges, mortar pits, and signal posts rotate or pulse toward active route threats once revealed.
entities.animation_rule: Static weapons use angle tracking, cooldown flashes, and signal pulse rings instead of free movement animation.
entities.movement_rule: Static ridge emplacements remain fixed to reveal slots and only change facing or flash state.

entities.facing_rule: Raiders, scouts, brutes, infiltrators, mortar trucks, and commander units face travel direction, blockers, or bunker impact direction.
entities.animation_rule: Enemy columns use runtime bob, hit shake, warning marks, and mortar truck rotation to keep route roles readable.
entities.movement_rule: Enemies enter from one of four fork routes, bend through the pass, then attack guards or the bunker once they reach contact distance.

entities.facing_rule: Bullets and mortar rounds rotate by travel angle while flare and rockslide effects expand from the triggered route center.
entities.animation_rule: Projectile trails, splash rings, and scan circles scale by remaining life and route event type.
entities.movement_rule: Projectiles chase live targets while route effects remain centered on selected fork positions until life expires.

required_runtime_checks: hidden slots remain abstract until reveal
primary guards and enemies have move attack hit and death readable states
facing field updates from route target or travel vector
runtime loads assigned assets through AssetManager and BitmapFactory
route effects remain distinct from decorative terrain
anchors and hitboxes stay aligned with ridge slot combat contact points
